module.description: The OpenModulePlatform portal and administration UI.

moduleDependencies.reason: Portal administration pages rely on the core OMP schema, module definition tables, RBAC model, artifacts, and host deployment tables.
Portal sign-in is backed by the OMP authentication module in HostAgent-first installations.

artifactConfigurationFiles.purpose: HostAgent-generated Portal appsettings with OMP connection string, auth, topbar, and artifact upload settings.

requiredTables.name: schema_migrations
requiredTables.purpose: Idempotency markers for Portal data migrations.

requiredTables.name: user_setting_int_values
requiredTables.purpose: Per-user numeric and boolean Portal preferences.

requiredTables.name: widget_permissions
requiredTables.purpose: Role or permission restrictions for Portal dashboard widgets.

requiredTables.name: user_active_widgets
requiredTables.purpose: Per-user dashboard widget placement and sizing.

requiredTables.name: user_active_widget_data
requiredTables.purpose: Extended per-widget user data for Portal dashboard widgets.

requiredTables.name: widget_data
requiredTables.purpose: Shared widget-level JSON data, such as the dashboard music player playlist.

requiredTables.name: widget_binary_data
requiredTables.purpose: Shared widget-owned binary media, such as dashboard music player MP3 files.

permissions.name: OMP.Portal.View
permissions.description: Read access to the OMP Portal.

permissions.name: OMP.Portal.Admin
permissions.description: Administrative access to the OMP Portal.

excludedSeedData.reason: Home entries are derived from currently enabled Portal/WebApp app instances, not fixed rows that should be repaired by literal key.
Child entries for content and example modules are documented on their owning module definitions.
